summary: A guest book web app called 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' with admin controls, hamburger menu, and guest entry saving/delete/modify features. Currently on Version 13 (live).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Bold outdoor-themed logo badge with large stylized 'VTH' initials in rugged condensed lettering, earthy green and brown tones, mountain silhouette or trail motif in the background (vth-avatar.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Update the main app title from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' everywhere it appears across the application, including the header in AppLayout.tsx, the AboutDialog.tsx modal, HowToUseDialog.tsx, CreateAccountDialog.tsx, the HTML page title in index.html, and any other component or page that displays the app name.

Redesign the VTH avatar/logo to prominently accentuate the 'VTH' initials. The new avatar should make 'VTH' the focal point with bold, legible lettering styled to evoke the outdoors/hiking theme (e.g., rugged serif or bold condensed sans-serif, earthy tones). Replace the existing avatar image with the new generated asset in all locations where the avatar appears, including the header in AppLayout.tsx and the AboutDialog.tsx modal.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change main title to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' across all pages including About popup modal
Remake avatar to accentuate 'VTH' branding, applied across all pages
